# Vincent Charlebois

> AI Systems Engineer and intermedia artist based in Montreal. Works at the intersection of agentic AI systems, distributed architectures, and ecological/cooperative technology.

## Pages

- [Home (EN)](https://vincentcharlebois.com/en/): Overview of focus areas — agentic AI, distributed systems, product-driven engineering
- [About (EN)](https://vincentcharlebois.com/en/about/): Background, practice, and approach
- [Projects (EN)](https://vincentcharlebois.com/en/projects/): Selected work including Hypha Worker Co-operative and vincentcharlebois.net
- [Contact (EN)](https://vincentcharlebois.com/en/contact/): GitHub, LinkedIn, Bluesky, email

## Key facts

- Name: Vincent Charlebois
- Role: AI Systems Engineer / artist-researcher / creative technologist
- Location: Montreal, Quebec, Canada
- Affiliation: Hypha Worker Co-operative (member-worker since November 2023)
- Focus: Agentic AI systems, distributed architectures, research-to-product translation
- GitHub: https://github.com/tripledoublev
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vincent-charlebois/
- Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/charlebois.info
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/vincencharleboi
